examples: Rarely has a late Liverpool equaliser at Anfield been celebrated with such delight than when Neil Ruddock powered home a brave header to salvage a point against champions Manchester United.
Ruddock won the Grand Slam with Wales in 2005 before leaving a year later.
Ruddock says he will also be talking to prop Darren Morris about his future.
But if the game does go ahead, Ruddock said he will be fielding a strong side.
